positive: A detailed, symmetrical mandala-style composition featuring bioluminescent celestial florals and mystical fauna, such as stylized moons and crescent nebulae integrated into blooming lotus and monstera leaves. The central subject is a vibrant geometric arrangement of organic elements, rendered in high-contrast negative space silhouette against a deep midnight indigo background. Use glowing cyan, ethereal lavender, and metallic gold accents for the luminous parts. Composition should be centered and highly detailed, suitable for a large-scale apparel print. Art style: Neo-Art Deco, psychedelic etching, mixed with Japanese woodblock printing techniques. Lighting: Dramatic spotlighting emphasizing the glowing edges of the flora. Ultra-detailed, vector-quality illustration, 8k resolution.
negative: blur, grain, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, extra limbs, mutated anatomy, poor composition, messy edges, realistic photography, low detail
